notifications.title: OpenAI key banned after auth failures
notifications.body: Key sk-••••4f2a returned 401 three times in a row and has been removed from rotation.

notifications.title: Sign-in locked after failed attempts
notifications.body: Five failed sign-ins from 203.0.113.44. That source is locked out for 15 minutes.

notifications.title: Customer Support AI at 82% of budget
notifications.body: The team has spent $984.10 of its $1,200.00 monthly cap.

notifications.title: Premium tier exhausted briefly
notifications.body: All premium keys were rate limited at 14:20 UTC. Requests fell through to standard.

notifications.title: Circuit breaker opened for Groq
notifications.body: Repeated upstream errors; the key is cooling for 5 minutes and traffic has moved to the next tier.

notifications.title: Data Science reached 50% of budget
notifications.body: The team has spent $451.90 of its $900.00 monthly cap.

notifications.title: Breaker recovered for OpenRouter
notifications.body: The half-open probe succeeded and the key is back in rotation.

notifications.title: Mobile App is over budget
notifications.body: The team has spent $612.40 of its $600.00 monthly cap. New requests are blocked until the period resets.
